title: croton tenellus
intro: Croton tenellus, also known as the yellow stem croton, is a species of plant in the family Euphorbiaceae, native to Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Croton tenellus include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, as well as its use in treating various respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
